_meta.description: Forestry section registered input node. User-editable wood volume used to calculate annual carbon storage offset from wood products in the building.

instances.label: Wood Volume
instances.note: Volume of wood products used in building construction. G-classified — shared across all models.

signature.inputs: This IS the input (registered via graph.registerInput in ForestryNodes.js)
signature.output: Value stored in MultiModelState, consumed by forestry.annualOffset calculation

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of forestry.annualOffset (wood carbon storage offset)
